import React from 'react'; import { BarChart3, Clock, Zap, CheckCircle2, MessageSquare, Play, ArrowRight, MousePointer2 } from 'lucide-react'; const PortfolioSite = () => { return (
{/* Navigation */}
EditGrowth
Impact Workflow Projets
{/* Hero Section */}
Partenaire de Croissance

JE NE MONTE PAS DE VIDÉOS.
JE SCALE VOTRE AUDIENCE.

Optimisation de la rétention, ingénierie du Hook et temps libéré. Transformez vos rushs en actifs business haute performance.

{/* Impact Section (KPIs) */}

x3

Productivité boostée

Passage de 1 à 3 vidéos/semaine sans perte de qualité.

300%

Vues moyennes

Grâce à une ingénierie chirurgicale du Hook et du rythme.

+40%

Watch Time

Pacing optimisé pour minimiser le drop-off des premières secondes.

{/* Workflow Section */}

WORKFLOW "ZÉRO FRICTION"

{[ { step: "01", title: "Ingestion", desc: "Centralisation via dossier partagé structuré. Pipeline organisé pour une fluidité totale." }, { step: "02", title: "Montage Stratégique", desc: "Storytelling, J-cuts et Sound Design immersif. Chaque frame sert votre rétention." }, { step: "03", title: "Feedback (Frame.io)", desc: "Révisions chirurgicales à la seconde près. 2 sessions de polissage incluses." }, { step: "04", title: "Livraison HQ", desc: "Export Master haute performance (Google Drive / Swisstransfer) prêt pour l'upload." } ].map((item, i) => (
{item.step}

{item.title}

{item.desc}

))}
{/* Case Studies Section */}

ÉTUDES DE CAS

{/* Case 1 */}
YouTube Business
Preview Video Content

Scale-up Niche Tech/SaaS

Le défi : Maintenir l'attention sur un tutoriel technique de 15 minutes.

B-rolls Contextuels • Pattern Interrupts • Data Viz Motion
+55%
Augmentation du
Watch Time moyen
{/* Case 2 */}
TikTok & Reels
Preview Vertical Content

Personal Branding High-Ticket

Le défi : Créer une signature visuelle qui arrête le scroll instantanément.

Dynamic Captions • Sound Design Immersif • Bitrate Optimisé
+3M
Vues cumulées
en 30 jours
{/* CTA Section */}

PRÊT À TRANSFORMER VOTRE
RÉTENTION EN CROISSANCE ?

Je ne prends que 2 nouveaux partenaires par mois pour garantir une attention chirurgicale sur chaque timeline.

Audit de chaîne offert • Places limitées

{/* Footer */}
© 2024 / EditGrowth / Focus on Quality over Quantity.
); }; Fait moi le portfolio la

**Considering React Design**

I'm currently focused on evaluating how to best implement this React portfolio website, specifically considering the EditGrowth template. I'm prioritizing ensuring a high-quality user experience using Tailwind CSS and Lucide icons. I'm exploring the nuances of the provided functional component.


**Refining Component Structure**

I've been working on refining the component structure. I plan to use an `App.tsx` file as the central layout manager. Individual components for the Navbar, Hero section, Impact Stats, Workflow, Case Studies, and Call to Action are also being developed. The goal is to create reusable components for better organization and maintainability.

payload.text: ok excellent voila des modifications : le texte au debut est trop gros , le bouton réserver mon audit change le en "réserver mon appel", le texte en dessous du gros texte au début personnalise le, pour le workflow met 1/ Rééception rushs 2/ Montage stratégique 3/ garde le texte 4/ livraison final,pour étude de cas met plutôt "exemple / etude de cas. pour le dernier bouton en blanc écrit : "réserve ton appel gratuitement". Pour les exemples met ces 3 vidéos : 1/ https://youtu.be/bZiMuGMiiF0?si=CtOZqYAKA31TvjIM 2/ https://youtu.be/Isw4HWYyKM0?si=sUTA2zRDap2k-i1e 3/ https://youtu.be/x-4ySAcZr6s?si=IKxY_N8jatIEOnKK Et il faut que tu mettes aussi des exemples de vidéo short form ( prend les plu pertinantes de celles de mon ancien portfolio que je t'ai donné).

**Refining Visual Elements**

I'm currently focused on the website's visual presentation. I've successfully addressed the hero title's size, aiming for a more balanced aesthetic across different screen sizes. I also updated the call-to-action text, changing "Réserver mon Audit" to "Réserver mon appel" and am now considering the description modifications under the main heading.


**Updating Workflow Details**

I'm currently updating the website's workflow section. The steps are now: "Réception rushs," "Montage stratégique," keeping the existing "Feedback Frame.io," and concluding with "Livraison finale." I've also swapped "ÉTUDES DE CAS" with "EXEMPLES / ÉTUDES DE CAS." Furthermore, "Démarrer la collaboration" has become "Réserve ton appel gratuitement." I'm integrating vertical video examples, using placeholders for now, that I have from your older portfolio. I am considering adjusting the `Hero.tsx` component and the `Workflow.tsx` component.


**Implementing Video Showcase**

I'm now fully focused on the video showcase. I've updated `CaseStudies.tsx` to accommodate three long-form video embeds, plus a new section for short-form video blocks. I'm using `iframe` elements for a clean, premium display, but considering a highly stylized video block design. The short-form section will incorporate TikTok/Reels elements with dynamic captions, immersive sound design, and bitrate optimization. I'll need to update the button text in `CTA.tsx` too.

payload.text: ok le premier texte au début met ma photo de profil que j'avais mis sur mon ancien portfolio et fait en sorte que le premier texte soit moins gros. Pour les études de cas / exemples, modifie les titres en mettant : vidéos Youtube pour Loann LV , met pour la première x3 vues depuis le début de sa chaîne, pour la deuxième +20% watchtime, la 3ème x2 la fréquence de ses post donc x2 productivité. Aussi ajoute je sais pas ou dans le site le témoignage de mon client Loann LV qui a 210k Abonnés qui était dans mon ancien portfolio. Le témoignage : https://youtube.com/shorts/1bquAnzzwqw?si=-LpAkYvNqXEfIqRN et le premier bouton et le dernier doivent rediriger vers mon lien calendly : https://calendly.com/nathan-morin0034/30min

**Considering Aesthetic Solutions**

I'm currently focused on visually representing user profiles. Thinking about placeholder images or an elegant design to compensate for the lack of video content is the central challenge. The text is already smaller, so further reduction isn't the primary focus right now. Exploring ways to integrate a simple yet effective profile representation is now the priority.


**Refining Specific Content**

I'm now revising the call-to-action buttons and long-form video details, while incorporating Loann LV's testimonial, striving for a high-end feel. I've updated the metrics for the three videos and added links. I'm also preparing to integrate short-form content examples from the "old portfolio," specifically focusing on Loann LV. The `Hero.tsx` and `CaseStudies.tsx` components are next for updates, starting with the profile picture and text size adjustments.

payload.text: pourquoi il y a une erreur 153 pour les vidéos youtubes ? Et prend les images depuis ce site : https://portfoliooga.framer.website/ donc prend ma photo de profil, le logo de loann lv etc... enlève aussi le texte pour le témoignage de loann lv et met son nombre d'abonnés en plus gros. règle vraiment ce problème d'erreur 153

**Analyzing Embedding Issues**

I've determined that "Error 153" commonly arises from YouTube's embedding restrictions, notably domain constraints and "X-Frame-Options." Though, with standard `youtube.com/embed/ID` links, I see the error as a syntax problem or the creator blocking embedding.


**Refining Embed Handling**

I'm adapting to preview restrictions. Standard iframe embeds will be used, and I'll clean the `https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID` format. I'll focus on replacing image sources with placeholders or inferred paths from the portfolio site, and update the profile picture with a more realistic version. Testimonial modifications are underway: removing the quote text, enlarging Loann LV's subscriber count, and ensuring YouTube Shorts embeds function correctly using the `/embed/` endpoint.


**Updating Button Navigation**

I'm focused on button placement. I will ensure Calendly links are on the first and last buttons. I'll also implement all of the previous changes.

payload.text: ok chnage le nom du site en haut à gauche en mettant : "Oga Studio" et en haut a droite pour le bouton blanc met : "Je me lance !" Pour les exemples short form met bien les exemples que j'avais sur mon ancien portfolio. Ajoute sur le portfolio je sais pas ou une section motion design avec les exemples qui sont sur mon ancien portfolio

**Updating the Website**

I'm focusing on the website updates, specifically the navbar and button text. "EditGrowth" will become "Oga Studio," and "Démarrer" is now "Je me lance !" on the white button. These are the immediate alterations for the site. I think I will move on to the next changes soon.


**Refining the Examples**

I'm now refining the short-form video examples and motion design section. I need to make these more complete by matching them from the previous portfolio I was given. I'll use placeholders if I can't find direct matches. I have the new portfolio site: `https://portfoliooga.framer.website/`, so I will use that to fill the gaps, and provide either embeddable shorts or high-quality previews for the short-form videos. I'll also add a new motion design section, with examples drawn from the old portfolio link, ensuring it has high-quality examples.


**Addressing YouTube Errors**

I'm now focused on fixing YouTube embeds to avoid error 153. I'm using the `https://www.youtube.com/embed/[ID]` format with parameters like "origin". I've also updated the profile picture and Loann LV logo from the Framer link. My next step involves updating the logo text to "Oga Studio" and the button text to "Je me lance !" in the website's `Navbar.tsx` and `Footer.tsx` files. I will also be updating the short form and motion design sections soon.


**Implementing the New Design**

I'm now fully immersed in implementing the new design elements. I've updated the navbar, footer, and logo text with "Oga Studio" and "Je me lance !". The motion design section is being integrated into `App.tsx` and created as a new component. I am creating vertical video boxes as placeholders for the short form. I'm also using images from the Framer site, including the profile and Loann LV logo.

payload.text: ok nickel maintenant rajoute des animations stylés quand on met la souris sur certains bouton etc... Et en vrai essaye de faire en sorte que le portfolio soit pas infini mdrr

**Addressing Portfolio Concerns**

I'm currently focused on rectifying the YouTube Error 153 within the Oga Studio application. This appears to be an origin or embed issue, which I'm working to resolve. Additionally, I'm sourcing new images from the provided Framer website URL, including both the profile picture and logo, for a visual refresh. "Je me lance !"


**Refining Portfolio Structure**

I've just refined the Loann LV section, including updated titles, metrics, and a bolder subscriber count for the testimonial. Calendly links are now integrated for all buttons. I'm focusing on compacting the portfolio layout and moving motion design examples to match. The navbar is updated to "Oga Studio," with a Calendly redirect for "Je me lance!" The hero section now has a smaller text and Calendly button, and a new profile picture. I'm streamlining ImpactStats and the workflow steps. I will update the case studies with the new title and Loann LV YouTube section.


**Implementing Portfolio Enhancements**

I'm now implementing the latest updates. I've updated the metrics for each video: x3 views for Video 1, a 20% increase in watchtime for Video 2, and x2 productivity for Video 3. The testimonial will feature a large "210K" count without any quote. Short form content utilizes the specified IDs. I'm swapping the Motion Design images from Framer. I also changed the CTA to redirect to Calendly. I'm working with Framer Motion-style transitions using CSS transitions, specifically `hover:scale` and `group-hover`. I am refining vertical padding and section combinations to make it more concise, and also addressing the YouTube Error 153 using `https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/`. I'm starting the updates by modifying the files, `components/Navbar.tsx`, `components/Hero.tsx`, `components/Workflow.tsx`, and `components/CaseStudies`.


**Prioritizing Image Sourcing**

I'm now focusing on image linking, ensuring the Framer assets are correctly integrated. I've updated links with specified IDs and sourcing profile pictures from the Framer website. I'm also compacting the portfolio's layout into a single-page design to reduce scrolling. I'm streamlining ImpactStats to be minimal, while refining layout structure and adding the YouTube IDs for the short form content.

entries.description: Removed the partner restriction text for a cleaner and more direct call to action.

payload.text: ok bien mais certains textes important on les voit pas et en vrai revient à la mise en page d'avant en mode c'est pas grave si le site est long

**Revising the Layout**

I'm currently focused on reverting to a longer layout. The shorter version wasn't ideal, as it hid crucial textual information. I'm also preparing to incorporate the new profile image, making a few tweaks as per the request. The goal is to maximize the display of important context.


**Implementing the Changes**

I've updated the profile picture and added the "TÉMOIGNAGE CLIENT" label to the testimonial section, and also reverted the layout to the longer version to improve readability. I've also removed the partner limitation text. The subscriber count font size has been increased, and I'm currently adjusting the vertical spacing in various components like Hero, ImpactStats, Workflow, and MotionDesign to restore the layout's original feel.


**Adjusting Visual Elements**

I'm now implementing spacing and size adjustments in `Workflow`, `CaseStudies`, and `CTA` components. I've updated the Loann LV image URL, added the "TÉMOIGNAGE CLIENT" header, and ensured a larger subscriber count font size. I've also removed the partner restriction sentence from the CTA component and restored larger padding throughout.


**Refining the Spacing**

I'm now focusing on spacing refinements for the "long" layout. I'm adjusting the Hero section to `pt-32 pb-24`, replacing the previous `pt-28 pb-16`. The Impact section is also getting a vertical padding update to `py-24` from `py-16`. I'm going to find the best image for Loann LV, using the provided URL or a placeholder if needed.

payload.text: met moins gros certain trucs et fait en sorte que tout les textes soient visibles. laisse les animations pour les boutons etc...

**Refining the Portfolio**

I'm now focused on refining the portfolio based on the recent feedback. My priority is reducing the size of some elements, as they felt oversized in the last iteration. I'm also carefully checking to ensure all text is legible, paying close attention to contrast and font choices. This should improve the overall presentation.


**Planning the Updates**

I've examined the current files and I am now planning the updates. I'm focusing on the "moins gros" feedback, so I'll begin by scaling down the hero section's `h1` and profile picture container. I also plan to make the big numbers in the ImpactStats section smaller, and to address the CaseStudies section: I'll update the Loann LV logo, add the testimonial heading and reduce the subscriber count's size. Finally, I will remove the partner text from the CTA section.


**Adjusting Design Sizing**

I'm now implementing the sizing adjustments, carefully aiming for a balanced "Goldilocks" effect. The `h2` elements are being scaled down from `text-8xl` to `text-6xl`. I'm starting by applying these tweaks to the `MotionDesign.tsx` section. Also, I am now updating the `h1` sizing and profile picture sizes within `Hero.tsx`. Further, I'll adjust the Loann LV image, subscriber count size, and add a testimonial header to `CaseStudies.tsx`, alongside removing partner text from `CTA.tsx`. Finally, the sizes in `ImpactStats.tsx` will be refined. I've switched the Loann LV URL to a fresh one, as per the recent update.
